summary: Reliability Fixes Testing (Iteration 129) - 8/11 backend tests passed (3 skipped due to no test data), Frontend _detected_by filter and document detail page verified working

minor.issue: BC API in demo/sandbox mode - 'Could not obtain BC token' expected behavior
Existing documents have old extraction_quality format (missing total_defined/total_extracted). New validations will have correct fields.

issues: Shows 'Fields Extracted: 2/3' for old data - this is from stored validation_results which uses old format. New validations will show correct total_defined/total_extracted.

critical_code_review_comments: DocumentDetailPage.js lines 83,93: _detected_by filter correctly filters out metadata fields from Extracted Data display
bc_validation_service.py lines 107-155: _compute_extraction_quality correctly returns total_defined and total_extracted based on job config
bc_validation_service.py lines 677-757: Shipping_Document validation includes customer/consignee matching via _match_customer_in_bc()
bc_validation_service.py lines 797-812: Sales Order NOT found is a HARD failure (all_passed=False, required=True)
bc_validation_service.py lines 820-823: No order number is only a WARNING (all_passed stays True)
bc_validation_service.py lines 337-349: extraction_quality_gate rejects documents with 0 meaningful fields

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Documents, Document Detail pages render correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Three reliability fixes verified: (1) Frontend _detected_by filter works - no metadata fields shown in Extracted Data card, (2) _compute_extraction_quality() unit tested and returns correct total_defined/total_extracted for Shipping_Document (10 fields = 2 required + 8 optional), (3) BC validation for Shipping_Document includes customer matching and Sales Order hard failure. BC API is in demo mode so live BC calls fail with 'Could not obtain BC token'. Existing documents in DB have old extraction_quality format.

verified: DocumentDetailPage.js filters _detected_by fields from both normalized_fields and extracted_fields (lines 83, 93)
Playwright test confirmed 13 fields visible, none with 'detected_by' in label
Filter uses key.endsWith('_detected_by') check

Returns both total_defined and total_extracted for UI display
Customer/consignee matching via _match_customer_in_bc() at line 693
Shipper matching via match_vendor_unified() at line 729
Sales Order NOT found = HARD failure (all_passed=False, required=True) at lines 801, 810
No order number = WARNING only (all_passed unchanged) at line 820
BC API demo mode returns 'Could not obtain BC token' as expected
Unit test: Empty extraction returns total_extracted=0, ready_for_draft_candidate=False
Code at lines 337-349 rejects documents with no meaningful fields
Returns 200 for valid documents
Includes document, workflows, event_timeline, derived_state
Loads with 79 Total Documents, 77 Auto-Cleared
Automation Intelligence shows 5% Automation, 39% Review, 56% Blocked
Loads without 500 error
Shows document info, classification, BC validation, extraction quality

PDF preview loads for documents with files
